query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.name,
  CASE WHEN dd.description IS NOT NULL AND dd.description != '' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as has_description,
  CASE WHEN dd.goal IS NOT NULL AND dd.goal != '' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END as has_goal
FROM drills d
LEFT JOIN drillDetails dd ON d.id = dd.drillId
ORDER BY d.name;
